Hand it an expenditure document; get back whether it is opex, capex, or mixed -- typed, in one call

Hand it a vendor document; get back the onboarding risk tier of a vendor document packet as typed JSON (low / standard / elevated / high / unknown) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `high` when the document is undecidable.
Hand it a revenue contract; get back whether it has a single, multiple, or series performance obligation -- typed, in one call
Hand it a receivables factoring agreement; extract it into typed JSON with exact Decimal money, per-field confidence, an overall confidence, and confidence-gated automatic re-run when a pass is weak.

Hand it a receivable document; get back whether a receivable is eligible for write-off as typed JSON (not_eligible / review_eligible / eligible / unknown) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `not_eligible` when the document is undecidable.
Hand it a pension benefit statement; get back whether the figures extract into structured fields -- typed, in one call

Hand it a payable document; get back the payment urgency tier of a payable as typed JSON (routine / due_soon / overdue / critical / unknown) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `critical` when the document is undecidable.
Hand it a letter-of-credit amendment; get back whether the terms extract into structured fields -- typed, in one call
Hand it a lease agreement; get back whether it is operating, finance, or short-term exempt -- typed, in one call

Hand it a invoice; get back which cost center an invoice should post to as typed JSON (facilities / it / marketing / operations / rnd / unknown) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `unknown` when the document is undecidable.

Hand it a invoice; get back whether an invoice is recurring or one-time as typed JSON (recurring / one_time / unknown) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `unknown` when the document is undecidable.
Hand it a import duty payment receipt; extract it into typed JSON with exact Decimal money, per-field confidence, an overall confidence, and confidence-gated automatic re-run when a pass is weak.
Hand it a grant cost document; get back whether the cost is allowable, conditional, or unallowable -- typed, in one call

Hand it a finance document; get back whether a finance document needs PII/PCI redaction before archival as typed JSON (no_redaction / pii_redaction / pci_redaction / both / unknown) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `unknown` when the document is undecidable.
Hand it a equipment lease schedule; extract it into typed JSON with exact Decimal money, per-field confidence, an overall confidence, and confidence-gated automatic re-run when a pass is weak.

Hand it a document; get back whether a document is an intercompany transaction as typed JSON (external / intercompany / indeterminate) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `indeterminate` when the document is undecidable.
Hand it a disclosure document; get back whether the relationship is arm's-length, related-party, or control -- typed, in one call

Hand it a card document; get back whether a card document is a refund or a chargeback as typed JSON (refund / chargeback / indeterminate) with the full ranked distribution, a confidence + margin gate, and a deterministic fail-safe to `indeterminate` when the document is undecidable.
